profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: How your restaurant appears to guests.
profile.heroNotePlaceholder: Grandma's recipes in the heart of the Old Town.
profile.heroNoteHint: Shown in italics at the top of the menu. Maximum 160 characters.

errors.phoneInvalid: The phone number is invalid. Enter a number with the country code.
errors.billing_locked: Billing is suspended on this account — resume payment to edit the profile.

photos.title: Photos
photos.subtitle: Upload new photos, choose a main one, delete the ones you don't like.
photos.noRestaurantTitle: No restaurant linked to this account yet
photos.noRestaurantBody: Contact the Tavli team if you've ended up here by mistake.

preview.title: Preview
preview.subtitle: See what guests see when they find you.
preview.statusNote: Note: your restaurant's status is “{status}” — your public page may not be visible to guests yet.
preview.noPublicPageBody: Publish the restaurant to get a public URL.

translations.title: Translations
translations.subtitle: Your page in English and German — each a parallel original, not a translation. Empty fields fall back to the Romanian version.
translations.noRestaurant: No restaurant linked to the account.

errors.billing_locked: Billing is suspended on this account — resume payment to edit translations.

hours.title: Opening hours
hours.subtitle: Your weekly opening hours. Exceptions for special dates will be available in a later stage.

errors.parseFailed: The schedule could not be read.
errors.atLeastOneOpen: At least one day must be open.
errors.billing_locked: Billing is suspended on this account — resume payment to edit opening hours.

availability.title: Availability
availability.subtitle: Define how many guests you can take per time slot, for each day. Guests can only book at the times configured here — unconfigured slots show as “fully booked”.
availability.emptyBody: Add time slots below or start from a default evening template (every day 18:00–22:00).
availability.seedPrompt: Default capacity for the 4-hour evening slot?

errors.endAfterStart: The end time must be after the start time.
errors.billing_locked: Billing is suspended on this account — resume payment to edit availability.
